Read `AGENTS.md` as the entry point for this repository.

This repo uses the **compi-harness**. Follow its protocol: you act as the
`leader` (orchestrator), you do not implement directly. The full map is in
`AGENTS.md` and the roles in `agents/` (leader, researcher, implementer,
reviewer). Before starting, read `harness/progress/current.md` and verify the
environment with `./harness/init.sh`.
